description_long: This object is a stylized, industrial-themed shotgun with a boxy, metallic body and a prominent cylindrical barrel at the front. The sides feature a transparent section displaying several sausages on rollers, with the word 'WURST' emblazoned above, suggesting a whimsical or novelty design. A robust handle is mounted on top, and a joystick-like control is attached to the rear, hinting at a mechanical or automated firing mechanism. The surface is primarily matte gray metal with black and red accents, and there are multiple vents and grilles along the sides for cooling or exhaust. The overall construction appears heavy and reinforced, with visible bolts and paneling. The design combines elements of a traditional shotgun with features reminiscent of a food cart or industrial appliance.
description: A boxy, metallic shotgun with a visible sausage roller, 'WURST' label, and joystick control, blending weapon and novelty food cart aesthetics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large cylindrical barrel opening and the handle above, with the sausage roller partially visible inside.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'WURST' label, transparent sausage roller compartment, and the main body details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the joystick control, handle, and the back panel with vents and connectors.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the sausage roller, 'WURST' label, and additional venting and control details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with a large front opening and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
